title: Bright Round Wire Nails - 20mm Length (Pack of 220)
features: Durable Construction: Made from basic mild steel, these round wire nails are built to last for general purpose use in joinery, furniture making and construction projects.
Suitable for Variety of Materials: these nails can be used to join both softwood and hardwood timber materials.
Easy Installation: The slim round head of these wire nails allows for quick hammering into place without splitting delicate woods.
Bright: These nails can be used indoors on woodworking and building tasks.
description: These quality bright round wire nails are perfect for all types of wood joinery, crafts and construction projects. The nails are made from basic mild steel for strength and durability. They have a smooth finish and rounded head for easy hammering. Once installed, the nails will securely and reliably hold two pieces of wood together. Use them to construct furniture, assemble frames, or for general DIY jobs around the home or workshop. With their affordable price and bulk quantity, these nails are a handy addition to any tool kit or supply box.
